verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It should be easy enough to remember That You meet my every need It should come natural by now but it slips my mind somehow And I forget to trust the truth that I believe

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I thought by now it would be second nature to love my neighbor as myself But then sometimes I can't quite tell If I love myself that well But it's obvious my mind could use some help

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So write It on my heart 'til I can't forget It Write It on my heart 'til It's as good as nailed in stone I want to love Your will 'til at last I let it become my own So write It on my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: By faith, I say I am a new creation and what I was has ceased to be And as I live from day to day Now I want my life to say those words of faith are my reality.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Til it's more than words on paper 'Til it's more than memorized 'TIl its more than whom I am and how I live my life
